creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: Building net-im/ekiga, at least starting with 4.0.1, configure fails linking boost_signals.  As of boost 1.65, c++11 is required, so now in order to link anything with boost, c++11 is required.  This unfortunately also spills into its dependencies--net/opal and devel/ptlib, which also need C++11
